task.name: Repository Cleanup and Organization
task.description: Clean up repository structure and remove old test files
requirements: Remove old test file .github/workflows/test-whisper-transcribe.yml (bash script) and keep only .github/workflows/test-whisper-transcribe.yaml (proper YAML)
Ensure whisper_mp4_transcript.sh exists and is executable
Create missing directories if needed (input/, test-output/)
Check for and create input/test-meeting.mp4 if missing (create a small placeholder if needed)
Document all changes made in a cleanup report markdown file
Do not modify the working GitHub Actions workflow file
validation_rules: Old test script file .github/workflows/test-whisper-transcribe.yml must be removed
New workflow file .github/workflows/test-whisper-transcribe.yaml must remain unmodified
whisper_mp4_transcript.sh must exist and be executable
input/ and test-output/ directories must exist
